differentialBuckets.action: A1c, fasting plasma glucose, or 2-hour OGTT to confirm.

differentialBuckets.label: Key thresholds and interpretation caveats: A1c: normal <5.7%; prediabetes 5.7-6.4%; diabetes >=6.5%. Fasting plasma glucose: normal <100 mg/dL; prediabetes 100-125; diabetes >=126.

initialTests.label: A1c, fasting plasma glucose, or 2-hour OGTT to confirm.

source.source_section: Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus generated endocrine workup: diagnostic workup
source.implementation_notes: Generated from endocrine workup automation; requires clinician sign-off before validated-intent activation.

initialTests.action: Interpret with local lab ranges. Reference anchors: A1c: normal <5.7%; prediabetes 5.7-6.4%; diabetes >=6.5%. Fasting plasma glucose: normal <100 mg/dL; prediabetes 100-125; diabetes >=126. 2-hour 75-g OGTT: normal <140 mg/dL; prediabetes 140-199; diabetes >=200. Random plasma glucose >=200 mg/dL with classic symptoms supports diabetes diagnosis. UACR normal <30 mg/g; moderately increased 30-300; severely increased >300.

initialTests.label: CMP/eGFR, urine albumin-creatinine ratio, fasting lipids.

Random plasma glucose >=200 mg/dL with classic symptoms supports diabetes diagnosis. UACR normal <30 mg/g; moderately increased 30-300; severely increased >300.
